result.summary: The page is mostly well-formed, but there is one clear data error (a negative jackpot amount) plus several layout/truncation issues where game tiles and navigation labels are cut off at the right edge and bottom of the viewport.

issues.description: The 'Cop The Lot Megaways' tile displays a negative jackpot value of '-$6,266.13', which is impossible for a jackpot amount and indicates a data or formatting bug.
issues.suggestion: Validate jackpot feed values on the client and server; hide or show a fallback (e.g., '—' or the base jackpot) when the value is negative or invalid.

issues.description: Game tiles in the third column ('Magnificent Phoenix', 'Munchin Millions', 'Hyper...', 'Dark Waters') are cut off at the right edge of the screen with roughly half the tile hidden.
issues.suggestion: If this is a horizontal carousel, add a visible scroll affordance (arrow/chevron or partial-peek styling with a fade); otherwise adjust the grid so tiles fit fully within the viewport on mobile widths.

issues.description: The top navigation tab label 'Hot Gar' (likely 'Hot Games') is truncated at the right edge without an ellipsis or scroll indicator.
issues.suggestion: Add a horizontal scroll hint (gradient fade or arrow) to the tab bar, or truncate labels with an ellipsis to make it clear more tabs exist.

issues.description: The bottom row of game tiles ('Who Wants To Be A Millionaire', pig-themed slot, 'Dark Waters') is partially obscured by the fixed bottom navigation bar.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding to the scrollable content equal to the height of the fixed nav bar so content is never hidden behind it.

issues.description: Jackpot amounts are shown inconsistently across tiles — some tiles show an amount ('$13,015.42'), others show none, making the overlay pattern look uneven.
issues.suggestion: Apply a consistent overlay treatment: show jackpot amounts only where valid, and keep placement/styling uniform across all tiles.
